memberdef.argsstring: (self, str host=DEFAULT_RELAY_HOST, int port=DEFAULT_RELAY_PORT, str public_ip=RELAY_PUBLIC_IP, int min_port=50000, int max_port=50010, int default_lifetime=DEFAULT_ALLOCATION_LIFETIME)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim:
Initialize relay server.
Args: host: Host to bind control channel port: Port for control channel public_ip: Public IP address for relay addresses min_port: Minimum relay port max_port: Maximum relay port default_lifetime: Default allocation lifetime
Start control channel for TURN messages.

Handle TURN control message.
Args: data: Message data client_addr: Client's (ip, port)
Returns: Response bytes or None
Handle SEND indication (data from client to peer).

Create relay socket for allocation.
Args: allocation: Turn allocation
Relay data loop for an allocation.

TURN Relay Server implementation.
Handles allocation requests and relays data between clients and peers.
